title: Positive flow: Enter address and use current location
test_steps: Click on the search bar and type '123 Main St'. | Click on the 'USE MY CURRENT LOCATION' button.
expected_result: The app should display nearby food options based on the entered address or current location.

title: Negative flow: Empty search bar
test_steps: Click on the search bar and leave it empty. | Click on the 'USE MY CURRENT LOCATION' button.
expected_result: The app should display an error message or prompt the user to enter an address.

title: Boundary validation: Long address
test_steps: Click on the search bar and type '123 Main Street, Anytown, USA'. | Click on the 'USE MY CURRENT LOCATION' button.
expected_result: The app should display nearby food options based on the entered long address.

title: Toggle state: Hamburger menu
test_steps: Click on the hamburger menu icon on the top left. | Click on the hamburger menu icon again to close it.
expected_result: The hamburger menu should toggle between open and closed states.

title: Clickable button: USE MY CURRENT LOCATION
test_steps: Click on the 'USE MY CURRENT LOCATION' button.
expected_result: The app should use the user's current location to find nearby food options.

title: Accessibility: Hamburger menu icon
test_steps: Perform a screen reader action on the hamburger menu icon.
expected_result: The screen reader should announce the label of the hamburger menu icon.

title: Usability: Search bar
test_steps: Click on the search bar and type '123 Main St'. | Press the enter key.
expected_result: The app should display nearby food options based on the entered address.

title: Interruption/resume: App closure
test_steps: Click on the search bar and type '123 Main St'. | Close the app. | Reopen the app. | Click on the 'USE MY CURRENT LOCATION' button.
expected_result: The app should display nearby food options based on the last entered address or current location.

title: Data persistence: Address persistence
test_steps: Click on the search bar and type '123 Main St'. | Click on the 'USE MY CURRENT LOCATION' button. | Close the app. | Reopen the app. | Click on the search bar and type '123 Main St'. | Click on the 'USE MY CURRENT LOCATION' button.
expected_result: The app should display nearby food options based on the last entered address or current location.
